heading: MINERAL INTEREST
operative_text: Except as provided by Subsection (b) of this section, each separate interest in minerals in place shall be listed separately from other interests in the minerals in place in the name of the owner of the interest.

defined_terms.definition_excerpt: each separate interest in minerals in place shall be listed separately from other interests in the minerals in place in the name of the owner of the interest

_note: Subsection (c) has two conflicting versions enacted by different Acts in 1989 (ch. 796 and ch. 450); both are reproduced verbatim in the source text. No truncation.
